initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM (
    SELECT state
    FROM alien_data
    GROUP BY state
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 0
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
    LIMIT 10
) AS top_10_states
JOIN (
    SELECT state, 
           AVG(age) AS avg_age,
           SUM(CASE WHEN aggressive = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) AS friendly_pct,
           SUM(CASE WHEN aggressive = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) AS hostile_pct
    FROM alien_data
    GROUP BY state
) AS state_stats ON top_10_states.state = state_stats.state
WHERE state_stats.avg_age > 200 
  AND state_stats.friendly_pct > state_stats.hostile_pct;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM (
    SELECT alien_data.state, 
           COUNT(*) AS alien_count, 
           AVG(alien_data.age) AS avg_age, 
           SUM(CASE WHEN alien_data.aggressive = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS friendly_count, 
           SUM(CASE WHEN alien_data.aggressive = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hostile_count
    FROM alien_data
    GROUP BY alien_data.state
    ORDER BY alien_count DESC
    LIMIT 10
) AS top_states
WHERE friendly_count > hostile_count AND avg_age > 200;

SELECT COUNT(alien_data.state) AS alien_count
FROM alien_data
WHERE alien_data.state IN (
    SELECT state
    FROM alien_data
    GROUP BY alien_data.state
    ORDER BY COUNT(alien_data.state) DESC
    LIMIT 10
)
GROUP BY alien_data.state
HAVING AVG(alien_data.age) > 200
   AND (SUM(CASE WHEN alien_data.aggressive = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*)) > 
       (SUM(CASE WHEN alien_data.aggressive = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*));

SELECT COUNT(alien_data.state) AS alien_count
FROM alien_data
GROUP BY alien_data.state
HAVING AVG(alien_data.age) > 200
   AND (SUM(CASE WHEN alien_data.aggressive = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*)) > 0.5
ORDER BY alien_count DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT COUNT(alien_data.state) AS alien_count, 
       AVG(alien_data.age) AS avg_age, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN alien_data.aggressive = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS friendly_count, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN alien_data.aggressive = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hostile_count
FROM alien_data
GROUP BY alien_data.state
ORDER BY alien_count DESC
LIMIT 10;

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT COUNT(alien_data.state) AS alien_count, 
       AVG(alien_data.age) AS avg_age, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN alien_data.aggressive = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS friendly_count, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN alien_data.aggressive = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hostile_count
FROM alien_data
GROUP BY alien_data.state
ORDER BY alien_count DESC
LIMIT 10;

candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    alien_data.state,
    COUNT(*) AS alien_count,
    AVG(alien_data.age) AS avg_age,
    SUM(CASE WHEN alien_data.aggressive = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS friendly_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN alien_data.aggressive = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hostile_count,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN alien_data.aggressive = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS friendly_percentage,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN alien_data.aggressive = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS hostile_percentage
FROM alien_data
GROUP BY alien_data.state
HAVING AVG(alien_data.age) > 200 
   AND SUM(CASE WHEN alien_data.aggressive = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > SUM(CASE WHEN alien_data.aggressive = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
ORDER BY alien_count DESC
LIMIT 10;
